name: IRSF-001: Genotype-Specific Clinical Characterization
description: Head-to-head characterization of 5 Rett syndrome genotype subgroups across all OMOP CDM domains. Targets are rarer genotypes (CDKL5, FOXG1, MECP2 Duplication) compared against the two largest MECP2 point mutation groups (severe R168X/R255X/R270X and mild R294X/R133C). All 6 feature builders extract demographics, conditions, drugs, procedures, measurements, and visits. Standardized mean differences (SMD) computed for all 6 target-comparator pairings to identify distinguishing clinical features.
